title: ヤエノムテキ恋歌地獄変

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while walking around the academy, I
spot Sakura Chiyono O talking to a
worried-looking Yaeno Muteki.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Sooo what you're saying is... you'd like me to help
you with some singing training?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes. The truth is that there's a certain genre I just
can't seem to get the hang of.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Specifically... songs with, um, hints of r-romance...
I find them embarrassing—both to sing and listen
to.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I seeee. Love songs, huh?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
However, as there's a possibility I'll have to sing
them during a winning concert, I can't complain!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
A win without the perfect winning concert is
utterly unthinkable!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Therefore I must overcome my sense of shame, no
matter the cost!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I can endure all manner of training. So, please, I
beg of you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'll do it! It's just like they always say,
there's no such thing as a free win!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's start by having you read the lyrics
aloud. That way, you can gradually get used to
them!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: O-osu! Ahem, here I go, then!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
"The moment you leave, I f-feel so a-alone... The
warmth of y-you... The warmth of y-your hand?
Is... so..."

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hngh!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Are you all right?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
W-well, it's j-just... these lyrics are... so much
more intense than I was expecting!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Should we stop?! Don't push yourself too hard!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
N-no! Backing down now would be akin to failing
altogether!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
"If I-I had t-told you... I l-l-loooooved you...
b-back then"... Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...If I had formally proposed a relationship...
perhaps our future would've been different...
Maybe not, though...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Come on, Yaeno! You can't change the lyrics!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: "I know what it's like to be... t-to be l-l-l-lonely..."

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, how helpless the heart of a maiden can be
when she seeks to open it and reveal the emotion
within...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: It sounds like you're reciting classical poetry now!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
A few words alone can carry greater weight than a
mountain, and depth greater than even the
ocean.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You do not know, my beloved, that there is no
one else for me but you...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...And you're done, right?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
M-my deepest apologies! I succumbed to my old
habits. I have failed...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
No, wait... I actually think it's okay to do it your
own way!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Sure, the lyrics are a little formal, but that's what makes them so you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It reminds me of a saying I once heard! "Different
cleats for different feets"!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Instead of trying to overcome it, you should
embrace your unique singing style! That's the way
to do it!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Chiyono O! I am in your debt!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...Indeed, the classical poems I've come to cherish
also express deep-seated feelings in vivid detail.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Be it a love song or an old poem, the emotions
expressed are not all that different.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: With that in mind, all I need to do... is take to the stage and fully express myself as I am!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A gleaming grin spreads across Yaeno Muteki's
face, as if the clouds hanging over her have
parted.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It is indeed as you said. If I have more confidence
in myself as I practice... I'm certain I will become a
great singer.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
To that end, I must learn and experience more
still! I will not stop until I've mastered all the
ancient poems!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Uh, no?! You're changing your goal a little there,
Yaeno!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...At any rate, it looks like Yaeno Muteki feels a
bit more confident singing love songs now.
